context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 77
WINDOW: 1165.200s to 1205.400s (smile at 1185.200s to 1190.400s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1086.150-1198.870] interviewee: He never asked me if I was  a Jew, because at that time at the beginning, there was no Jewish questions. They didn't know-- there was no orders what to do with the Jews. And he said, oh, he welcomed me. And now go back to your hometown. It's already in Germany. And they helped me even with transportation and trucks and cars-- either way. And in a few days, I was already home. We marched 10 days. But maybe two,  three days I was home already.
[1198.870-1228.540] interviewee: The other colleagues who went to Russia-- there is not one alive. They all were killed in '40

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
they helped me even with transportation and trucks and cars--

And in a few days, I was already home. We marched 10 days. But maybe two,  three days I was home already.
